justification: All pass criteria met: 5 valid transitions from AC1 implemented, InvalidTransitionError with code:'INVALID_TRANSITION' property, both CANCELLED and DELIVERED enforced as terminal states with exhaustive tests, 29 tests covering all valid transitions plus well beyond 2 invalid transitions, AC6 explicitly tested, no external libraries, acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs.

observations.text: Adjacency-set design with O(1) lookup is clean and makes valid transitions explicit
10 invalid transition tests far exceeds the minimum 2 required
Terminal state tests are exhaustive — tests all 5 possible targets from both CANCELLED and DELIVERED
CONFIRMED->CANCELLED path explicitly included, avoiding the common whitelist omission
InvalidTransitionError subclass is a reasonable deviation that still satisfies the spec contract
Self-transitions treated as invalid is a sound assumption documented clearly
